list.title: Stock Management
list.syncedFromErp: Stocks are automatically synchronized from the ERP system
list.search: Search by stock name or ERP code...
list.loadError: An error occurred while loading data.

detail.title: Stock Detail
detail.basicInfoReadonly: Basic information is synchronized from the ERP system and cannot be changed
detail.notFoundDesc: The stock record you are looking for may have been deleted or never created.
detail.tipDescription: Do not forget to save after updating stock details. If ERP integration is enabled, data will be updated in the next synchronization.
detail.relationHint: Define lower or upper related products for this stock.
detail.subtitle: Stok bilgilerini, görselleri ve bağlı stokları yönetin
detail.htmlDescriptionDesc: Web ve belge çıktılarında kullanılacak açıklama alanı

warehouseBalances.title: Warehouse balances
warehouseBalances.emptyDesc: No rows were found in the SalesDesk warehouse stock balance mirror for this stock. ERP balance may exist, but it must be synced before it appears here.
warehouseBalances.loadErrorDesc: An error occurred while fetching warehouse stock balances.

images.upload: Drag and drop images here or click
images.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
images.noImagesDesc: Bu stok için henüz bir görsel kaydı bulunmuyor.

relations.quantity.positive: Quantity must be a positive number
relations.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}} related stock?
relations.noRelationsDesc: You can define new relationships using the form on the left.

bulkImport.rule1: Folders in the ZIP must be grouped by ERP stock code.
bulkImport.rule3: If the stock code is found, images are added to it; otherwise, the file is skipped.
bulkImport.rule4: Large archives are processed as a Hangfire job in the background. A ZIP archive is required.
bulkImport.fileRequired: Please select a ZIP file first.
bulkImport.title: Bulk Stock Image Import
bulkImport.description: Upload a single ZIP. The system reads the ERP stock code from the folder name and adds images to the related stock.
bulkImport.uploadHint: Drag and drop the ZIP file here or click to select
